pier.codex.confirmSwitch.description: Show a confirmation dialog before switching the active Codex account.

description: Codex account management and usage monitoring for Pier.

en.name: Codex Account Management
en.description: Manage Codex accounts, login, switch, and monitor usage.

pier.codex.accounts.title: Codex Usage
pier.codex.accounts.description: View Codex usage and quickly switch accounts.

pier.codex.confirmSwitch.label: Confirm before switching
pier.codex.confirmSwitch.description: Show a confirmation dialog before switching to another Codex account.

messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.title: Codex Accounts
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.description: Manage your Codex accounts. The active account is used for AI conversations.
Your login stays on this device. Accounts are materialized from your local Codex installation.
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.loginPendin: Finish the Codex login flow in your browser or cancel it before adding another account.
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.systemDefau: Uses your local Codex installation. No additional configuration needed.
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.confirmSwit: This will switch to the system default Codex installation.
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.removeConfi: This account will be removed from Pier. Your Codex login on this device is not affected.
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.emptyDesc: Add a Codex account or adopt the current login to get started.
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.confirmSwit: Show a confirmation dialog before switching to another account.
messages.pier.codex.widget.noUsageHint: Usage will appear after the next refresh.

zh-CN.name: Codex 账户管理
zh-CN.description: 管理 Codex 账号，登录、切换、观测用量。

pier.codex.accounts.title: Codex 用量
pier.codex.accounts.description: 查看 Codex 用量和快速切换账号。

pier.codex.confirmSwitch.label: 切换账号前弹窗确认
pier.codex.confirmSwitch.description: 切换到其他 Codex 账号前先弹一个确认对话框。

messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.title: Codex 账号
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.description: 管理你的 Codex 账号，活跃账号将用于 AI 对话。
登录信息仅保留在本设备。账号从本地 Codex 安装物化而来。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.loginPendin: 请在浏览器中完成 Codex 登录流程，或取消后再添加其他账号。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.systemDefau: 使用本地 Codex 安装，无需额外配置。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.confirmSwit: 将切换到系统默认的 Codex 安装。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.removeConfi: 该账号将从 Pier 中移除，不影响本设备上的 Codex 登录。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.emptyDesc: 添加一个 Codex 账号，或采用当前登录以开始使用。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.confirmSwit: 切换到其他账号前弹出确认对话框。
messages.pier.codex.accounts.settings.loadFailed: 无法加载 Codex 账号
messages.pier.codex.widget.loadFailed: 无法加载 Codex 账号
messages.pier.codex.widget.noUsageHint: 用量数据将在下次刷新后显示。
